  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/verify_token"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Verifica si el token de autenticación del tenant es válido.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}

  parameters={undefined}
>

  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"api_token":{"type":"string","description":"Token JWT a verificar"}}}}}}}
